testcase.name: test_monte_carlo_engine
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_plan_meeting_features.py:483: in test_monte_carlo_engine assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","initial_value"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"current_age":45,"retirement_age":60,"current_net_worth":1978000,"annual_income":350000,"annual_expenses":120000,"savings_rate":0.15,"expected_return":0.07,"volatility":0.15,"inflation_rate":0.03,"retirement_target":3500000,"simulations":10000},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","annual_contribution"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"current_age":45,"retirement_age":60,"current_net_worth":1978000,"annual_income":350000,"annual_expenses":120000,"savings_rate":0.15,"expected_return":0.07,"volatility":0.15,"inflation_rate":0.03,"retirement_target":3500000,"simulations":10000},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_scenario_simulator_life_scenario
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_plan_meeting_features.py:506: in test_scenario_simulator_life_scenario assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","scenario_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"scenario_type":"retire_early","current_age":45,"retirement_age":60,"current_net_worth":1978000,"annual_income":350000,"annual_expenses":120000,"savings_rate":0.15,"expected_return":0.07},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","base_probability"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"scenario_type":"retire_early","current_age":45,"retirement_age":60,"current_net_worth":1978000,"annual_income":350000,"annual_expenses":120000,"savings_rate":0.15,"expected_return":0.07},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","net_worth"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"scenario_type":"retire_early","current_age":45,"retirement_age":60,"current_net_worth":1978000,"annual_income":350000,"annual_expenses":120000,"savings_rate":0.15,"expected_return":0.07},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","annual_savings"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"scenario_type":"retire_early","current_age":45,"retirement_age":60,"current_net_worth":1978000,"annual_income":350000,"annual_expenses":120000,"savings_rate":0.15,"expected_return":0.07},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","years_to_retirement"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"scenario_type":"retire_early","current_age":45,"retirement_age":60,"current_net_worth":1978000,"annual_income":350000,"annual_expenses":120000,"savings_rate":0.15,"expected_return":0.07},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_ai_wealth_insights
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_plan_meeting_features.py:530: in test_ai_wealth_insights assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","net_worth"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"current_age":45,"retirement_age":60,"current_net_worth":1978000,"annual_income":350000,"annual_expenses":120000,"savings_rate":0.35,"expected_return":0.07,"retirement_target":3500000},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","total_assets"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"current_age":45,"retirement_age":60,"current_net_worth":1978000,"annual_income":350000,"annual_expenses":120000,"savings_rate":0.35,"expected_return":0.07,"retirement_target":3500000},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","total_debt"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"current_age":45,"retirement_age":60,"current_net_worth":1978000,"annual_income":350000,"annual_expenses":120000,"savings_rate":0.35,"expected_return":0.07,"retirement_target":3500000},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","super_balance"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"current_age":45,"retirement_age":60,"current_net_worth":1978000,"annual_income":350000,"annual_expenses":120000,"savings_rate":0.35,"expected_return":0.07,"retirement_target":3500000},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","investment_portfolio"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"current_age":45,"retirement_age":60,"current_net_worth":1978000,"annual_income":350000,"annual_expenses":120000,"savings_rate":0.35,"expected_return":0.07,"retirement_target":3500000},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
